focalElement: Princess Aurelia standing with golden aura, freed from the shattered crystal
secondaryElement: rose-pink crystal shards drifting upward around her feet, warm holy sunrays fanning from behind
notes: PrincessCrystalCell reveal state (120w × 120h) — Aurelia replaces the crystal when `princessCrystal.freed === true`
Warm gold CSS drop-shadow glow applied on top of the webp in PrincessCrystalCell.css
Full figure from head to below-knees; centered vertical symmetry to match crystal silhouette geometry
No cathedral arch / stone frame inside the composition — the cell's chrome is the only frame
